task_completion.description: Navigate to the target local repository
task_completion.visual_evidence: The repository manager UI (e.g., JFrog Artifactory, Nexus) is open and the 'example-repo-local' repository is selected or visible in the repository browser.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the specific artifact directory
task_completion.visual_evidence: The UI shows navigation through the directory tree or breadcrumbs to 'org/apache/commons/commons-lang3/3.14.0/'.

task_completion.description: Open the upload or deploy artifact dialog
task_completion.visual_evidence: An 'Upload', 'Deploy', or 'Add Artifact' dialog/screen is open within the repository manager interface.

task_completion.description: Select the valid replacement file from the local filesystem
task_completion.visual_evidence: The file selection dialog or the upload form explicitly shows the file '/home/ga/Desktop/commons-lang3-3.14.0.jar' selected as the source file to be uploaded.

task_completion.description: Ensure the target path for the upload is correct
task_completion.visual_evidence: The upload/deploy form shows the Target Path correctly set to 'org/apache/commons/commons-lang3/3.14.0/commons-lang3-3.14.0.jar' (or the equivalent directory path if the filename is appended automatically).

task_completion.description: Verify the artifact was successfully uploaded/replaced
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success notification, message, or the updated repository view showing the 'commons-lang3-3.14.0.jar' file present at the correct path, indicating the upload completed.

integrity.description: The agent used the graphical user interface to perform the task
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a web browser and the repository manager's web UI, rather than just executing API/curl commands in a terminal.

integrity.description: The agent selected the actual file from the desktop
integrity.visual_evidence: A system file picker dialog or browser upload mechanism is visible showing the selection of the file from the Desktop directory, not a mocked text editor screen.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the UI using terminal shortcuts
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal is not used to run commands like 'curl -T' or 'cp' to directly manipulate the repository backend files or bypass the web interface upload process.
